raw_title: Blowing Off Steam: How Power-Flexible AI Factories Can Stabilize the Global Energy Grid
raw_content: At the half-time whistle of the UEFA EURO 2020 round of 16 football match between England and Germany, millions of viewers stepped away from their screens in the U.K. to do the same thing at the same time — turn on their kettles.
